title: Beef and Corned Beef Stir Fry
description: A classic Chinese dish with a twist, combining the flavors of beef and corned beef in a savory stir fry.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the wok and set aside.
Add the corned beef and cook until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the vegetables and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Return the beef to the wok and stir in the soy sauce, hoisin sauce, and fish sauce.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Optional: Add a sprinkle of green onions and sesame seeds for garnish.
